description: Remediation of non-critical review findings CF-07..CF-14 with full documentary consistency, story-level traceability, scoped UX/docs refinements, and controlled closure governance.

userStories.title: Define closure vocabulary for findings
userStories.description: As a governance owner, I want one official closure vocabulary so that status for CF-07..CF-14 is consistent and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Document official statuses: Resolved, Deferred, Split to Follow-up
Define objective usage rule for each status with one concrete example
Publish cross-sync checklist for req/prd/progress before done
Typecheck/lint remains green after documentation update

userStories.title: Create single finding closure matrix
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want one closure matrix so that owner, evidence and final decision are visible for each finding.
acceptanceCriteria: Create matrix for CF-07..CF-14 with finding, owner, final status, expected evidence, follow-up reference
Each finding has exactly one final decision
Deferred/Split entries include rationale and backlog reference
Matrix is hosted in the non-critical remediation task artifacts

userStories.title: Reconcile contradictory status narratives
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want contradictory status entries removed so each impacted task has one coherent completion narrative.
acceptanceCriteria: Update artifacts impacted by CF-07, CF-09 and CF-12 to remove conflicting states
Add reconciliation note when temporary blocker later became resolved
Progress and PRD conclusion are aligned for each impacted task
Finding-level evidence is linked in the closure matrix

userStories.title: Align simplification and non-goals scope
userStories.description: As a scope owner, I want simplification and non-goals aligned with the real delivered state to prevent renewed drift.
acceptanceCriteria: Align webview simplification statements with current documented state
Resolve non-goal divergence with explicit decision: docs fix, implementation fix, or justified exception
Each decision includes owner and technical rationale
No item remains without final destination (resolved/deferred/split)

userStories.title: Harmonize E2E scope statements
userStories.description: As a QA owner, I want one official E2E scope decision so acceptance and evidence are unambiguous across artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: Define official E2E scope decision for this cycle
Apply the same E2E scope statement across req/prd/progress artifacts
If deferred, include backlog reference with owner and acceptance target
No conflicting E2E scope statement remains in reviewed artifacts

userStories.title: Standardize story-level evidence pattern
userStories.description: As a technical auditor, I want a minimum evidence template per story so each remediation record can be verified without assumptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Define minimum story evidence template: changed files, commands run, observable results
Apply template to tasks flagged with weak traceability (CF-11, CF-12)
Validate records are auditable without external context
Publish reusable pattern for future tasks

userStories.title: Link Deferred/Split items to FUP backlog
userStories.description: As a backlog manager, I want standardized references for non-closed items so continuity has ownership and actionability.
acceptanceCriteria: Every Deferred or Split item references internal backlog in tasks/ using FUP-xx convention
Each reference includes owner, rationale, and next actionable step
No in-scope finding remains open without continuity reference
Closure matrix points to all associated FUP items

userStories.title: Execute mandatory UX/docs refinements
userStories.description: As a webview maintainer, I want low-risk UX/docs refinements from CF-14 completed so non-critical scope can close this cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement feasible CF-14 UX/docs refinements in this cycle
Update related documentation and completion records
If residual remains, register Split to Follow-up with FUP-xx and acceptance target
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill for visual changes

userStories.title: Run final controlled closure validation
userStories.description: As an approver, I want final closure gates validated so this non-critical task finishes without unresolved dependency on critical findings.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm 100% of CF-07..CF-14 with valid final status in matrix
Confirm no unresolved dependency on CF-01..CF-06 for acceptance
Validate AC-01..AC-04 checklist from requirement document
Record final approval with date and owner
